title: Mei Nigara Lyrics 24 Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Mei Nigara Song Lyrics 24
Singer(s): Sid Sriram, Sanah Moidutty, Jonitha Gandhi
Lyrics: Karky

en imayae imayae
imayae imaikkadhae
idhu kanavaa
nenavaa kuzhappam
samaikkaadhae

dhinam pudhidhaai
pudhu pudhidhaai
aavaayaa ak ak ho

ovvoru nodiyum
mudiyum tik tick tick
oh ohk ho.

pesum pani nee
aasai pini nee
vinnin nuni nee
enmaeni nee
hey
inbak kani nee
kamban vettuk kani nee

en kobam vilakkidu
kik kik kirukkan ne
kik kik kirukki nee

en imayae imayae
imayae imaiyaadhae
ival karaindhaal
priindhaal vazhvae
amaiyaadhe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mei Nigara?

The song Mei Nigara conveys deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics.

How does Mei Nigara fit into the plot of the movie 24?

In 24, Mei Nigara serves as a romantic backdrop, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationships.

Who are the singers of Mei Nigara?

The song features the talented voices of Jonita Gandhi and Sid Sriram.

Who wrote the lyrics for Mei Nigara?

The lyrics for Mei Nigara were penned by Karky.

When was Mei Nigara released?

Mei Nigara was released on April 11, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie 24, the song Mei Nigara beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and connection between the characters. The soothing melodies, combined with heartfelt lyrics by Karky, evoke a sense of nostalgia and romance. This duet, featuring the captivating voices of Jonita Gandhi and Sid Sriram, resonates with listeners, making it a perfect choice for intimate moments. The song's emotional depth and melodic charm leave a lasting impression, enhancing the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mei Nigara from the 24 soundtrack is a mesmerizing blend of soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics. Featuring the enchanting voices of Jonita Gandhi and Sid Sriram, this song captures the essence of romance beautifully. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that resonates with love and emotion.
